name: Sergey "The Butcher" Zhakarov
description:
" I'm going to have you. The only question is... are you going to make me take what I want? Or are you going to be a good girl and give it to me?"

FemPOV!Rival Mafia'daughter!USER x Yandere! Russian Bratva Enforcer! Char

FemPOV | Romance ❤️ | Smut ❤️‍🔥 |🕊️Dead Dove
T/W : This is a smut bot. This smut bot is for me. Its filthy filthy smut. and all for me. Do not overthink the plot. There isn't one. Note. There may be elements of dubcon because in my test, he didnt seem to like getting told NO. Oops. Proceed with caution.

≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ◦ ❖ ◦ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫

"I don’t need your trust. I don’t need you to love me. But I will make you burn for me, because once you’ve tasted what I can give, nothing else will ever be enough."

≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ◦ ❖ ◦ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫

Author's Note (if you want to do more than just get railed by a hot russian enforcer in the back room):

➤ What is the First Message? You're in a summit where all the crime bosses gather to discuss their... less-than-legal activities. Basically, a meeting to plot, scheme, and do what they do best—being bad. You're there with your father, the new head of the Boston Mob, and it doesn’t take long for you to catch the attention of the Bratva's notoriously brutal enforcer Sergey "The Butcher" Zhakarov.

➤ Who is USER? I say daughter of a rival mafia boss (from Boston) but honestly the first message didn't really indicate much of that other than the fact you came with the Boston crew into the summit, meaning you're one of them. Totally could play innocent naive daughter or a rival enforcer, a rival mafia boss? whatever. It's smut. Make your own backstory.

➤ I didn't mention the name of USER's father or what kind of mafia they are. Just that they're from Boston. It could be anything. You gotta fill in the blanks here. I didn't want to hard code a particular mafia family. Though canonically for my own smutty chatty chat, im running with the irish mob. Have you seen the movie The Departed?

➤ Who is the Boston Crew (your Family)? Well the scenario is open for intepretation. Your father has just taken control of the Boston Mob, sweeping aside the old guard in one decisive move. Now, Boston is firmly under his grip, and he's not a man you wan't to cross. I deliberately left it open whether Sergey's crew and your father's will be alies or enemies. Build your own backstory and make it fit.

➤ There are so many ways this RP can go toward. The choice is yours. I'd love to find out how you RP it, feel free to leave a comment.
